name: The Holiday
overview: The story follows Kate, a woman who discovers that her husband is having an affair during a luxurious holiday somewhere in the Mediterranean. The troubled couple are sharing a villa with four of Kate’s closest friends, one of which is the adulterous partner, but she doesn’t realise that the guilty party could be prepared to kill in order to keep their secret safe.

trailers.title: The Holiday | Official Trailer | A Viaplay Original
New drama on Channel 5 | The Holiday starts Tuesday 1st March at 9pm | Official Trailer
